nodes.label: Iterative comprehension checking — reads then simplifies sentence by sentence
nodes.grounding_span: I'll go back read it a second time and stop at each sentence I may not understand, copy it, paste it on ChatGPT, then ask it to simplify it

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — distinguishes high-stakes from low-stakes tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer writing my arguments for motions myself...versus relying on AI for spell check or helping you find case law
